mapper.select: select * from fp_platform_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by created_at desc
select * from fp_platform_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select * from fp_platform_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and region_id = #{regionId}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_platform_config (id, tenant_id, env_id, region_id, name, platform_base_url, omp_base_url, platform_auth_type, platform_api_key, omp_auth_type, omp_api_key, sync_enabled, sync_interval_sec, platform_connection_status, omp_connection_status, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{envId}, #{regionId}, #{name}, #{platformBaseUrl}, #{ompBaseUrl}, #{platformAuthType}, #{platformApiKey}, #{ompAuthType}, #{ompApiKey}, #{syncEnabled}, #{syncIntervalSec}, #{platformConnectionStatus}, #{ompConnectionStatus}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update fp_platform_config set name = #{name}, platform_base_url = #{platformBaseUrl}, omp_base_url = #{ompBaseUrl}, platform_auth_type = #{platformAuthType}, platform_api_key = #{platformApiKey}, omp_auth_type = #{ompAuthType}, omp_api_key = #{ompApiKey}, sync_enabled = #{syncEnabled}, sync_interval_sec = #{syncIntervalSec}, platform_connection_status = #{platformConnectionStatus}, omp_connection_status = #{ompConnectionStatus}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_platform_config where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
